description: Redacted telemetry row from a real search_with_fallback run (2026-07-08). No repo paths or PII.
notes: warm_lines_pulled counted raw scoped grep lines at measurement time (Jul 2026 telemetry).
Current traceback caps agent-visible grep hits at 15 (rankGrepHits maxTotal); telemetry uses grep_summary.total_hits.
Re-runs on a newer checkout of the same private repo may differ (git scope + code churn).
